articles.title: US aid cuts harm global human rights movement, says Human Rights Watch
articles.description: A Human Rights Watch report says the US government's 2025 foreign aid cuts harmed the global human rights movement. Titled 'Every Autocrat's Dream', it details how the cuts halted investigations and support for victims in 16 countries.

articles.title: VD Satheesan appointed Kerala Congress CLP leader, AICC team to visit
articles.description: VD Satheesan has been named the new Kerala Congress Legislative Party leader. AICC observers confirmed the decision followed wide consultations and will visit Thiruvananthapuram. Satheesan thanked Rahul Gandhi and called for a collective effort.

articles.title: Public support outweighs seniority: V D Satheesan emerges winner in Kerala CM race
articles.description: Kerala CM: Congress named VD Satheesan as Chief Minister after weighing public support, UDF backing and his leadership in Opposition. Rahul Gandhi, Mallikarjun Kharge and allies including Muslim League were part of the final consultations in Delhi.

articles.title: EC Orders Phase III Of Special Intensive Revision In 16 States, 3 UTs; Himachal, J&K, Ladakh Excluded
articles.description: Election Commission of India launches SIR Phase III in 16 States and 3 UTs, 3.94 lakh BLOs to visit 36.73 crore electors, excluding Himachal Pradesh, Jammu and Kashmir, Ladakh

articles.title: HC reserves verdict as amicus curiae points: ‘A cyclist can use rail underbridge, a pedestrian also can...they can’t use flyovers’
articles.description: Referring to page 290 of the Master Plan, Bedi argued that dedicated BRTS corridors had already been proposed, including along Dakshin Marg.

articles.title: Karti Chidambaram slams Centre over NEET leak, demands its scrapping
articles.description: Congress MP Karti Chidambaram called the NEET-UG 2026 paper leak a "colossal failure," demanding the exam's scrapping. He also expressed confidence that Congress MLAs would be inducted into the Tamil Nadu Cabinet under CM Vijay.

articles.title: Siddaramaiah congratulates V D Satheesan, new Chief Minister of Kerala
articles.description: Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah congratulated V D Satheesan on being elected as the Leader of the Congress Legislature Party and the next Chief Minister of Kerala, praising his long political journey and legislative experience.

articles.title: VD Satheesan's Net Worth: New Kerala CM Owns Assets Worth Over Rs 6 Crore
articles.description: The Congress on Thursday officially announced senior leader V D Satheesan as the new Chief Minister of Kerala, ending days of intense speculation over who would lead the Congress-led United Democratic Front (UDF) after its resounding election victory.

articles.title: ECI announces schedule for Phase 3 of Special Intensive Revision of electoral rolls
articles.description: ECI announces Phase III schedule for SIR electoral rolls, covering 16 states and 3 Union Territories, enhancing voter eligibility.

articles.title: Congress Picks VD Satheesan as Kerala CM After 10 Days of Talks and Leadership Battle
articles.description: The Congress has appointed V D Satheesan as Kerala’s new Chief Minister after ten days of internal consultations and leadership discussions. Satheesan defeated contenders including K C Venugopal and Ramesh Chennithala in the race for the top post. Calling it the start of a “new Kerala,” Satheesan promised governance reforms and thanked Venugopal for coordinating the Congress campaign. He is widely seen as the architect of the UDF’s sweeping 102-seat victory. Watch

articles.title: EAM Jaishankar welcomes Russian FM Sergey Lavrov at BRICS Foreign Ministers' meeting
articles.description: New Delhi hosted the BRICS Foreign Ministers' meeting. External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar welcomed delegates from member and observer nations. The meeting is part of India's 2026 BRICS chairship. Discussions covered global and regional issues. India assumed the BRICS Chairmanship on January 1.

articles.title: 'Have entered the fray to abolish Sanatana': Now, TVK MLA Mustafa endorses Udhayanidhi Stalin's remark
articles.description: TVK MLA VMS Mustafa's remarks endorsing DMK leader Udhayanidhi Stalin's call to "abolish Sanatan" have sparked a political controversy in Tamil Nadu. Mustafa stated that his party also subscribes to the ideals of Periyar and Ambedkar, aiming to eradicate Sanatana. These comments come after Udhayanidhi reignited the debate in the Assembly, drawing criticism from the BJP.

articles.title: 'Entirely Unfounded': UAE's SWIFT Denial After Netanyahu Claims Secret Meet With MBZ During Iran War
articles.description: The United Arab Emirates has strongly denied reports that Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu secretly visited the country during the Iran conflict or that it hosted any Israeli military delegation. The denial came after Israel claimed Netanyahu met UAE President Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan amid the regional crisis. The UAE insisted its ties with Israel are conducted openly under the Abraham Accords and warned media against spreading “unverified information.” The controversy comes as tensions between Iran, Israel, and Gulf nations continue to escalate.

articles.title: Vijay's MLA Mustafa says ‘Sanatana’ will be abolished
articles.description: We too subscribe to the ideals of Periyar and Ambedkar. We too have entered the fray to abolish Sanatana, says VMS Mustafa

articles.title: Iran FM Araghchi meets Jaishankar at BRICS meeting in Delhi
articles.description: The BRICS meeting is being held at the Bharat Mandapam in the national capital.

articles.title: Modern conflicts will be shaped not only by fighter aircraft but also by AI, cyber warfare: Air Marshal Ashutosh Dixit
articles.description: Air Marshal Ashutosh Dixit emphasized that India's future military strength hinges on AI, cyber warfare, and drones, not just traditional platforms. He urged MSMEs to become long-term national security partners, highlighting a significant ₹10 lakh crore opportunity in the expanding defence ecosystem.

articles.title: OPINION | Modi’s 5-nation visit will deepen India’s multi-alignment approach to foreign policy
articles.description: From May 15 to 20, the prime minister will visit key powers across West Asia and Europe. The underlying message is India is no longer content with symbolism; it’s looking to strengthen partnerships

articles.title: KC Venugopal vs VD Satheesan: Does Congress Have Answer To Kerala Drama?
articles.description: The Congress-led UDF recorded an emphatic win in last month's Kerala Assembly election, sweeping 102 of the state's 140 seats to stop the CPM-backed Left Democratic Front from retaining power in the last state it rules.

articles.title: SIR Goes Beyond Polls As Bengal, Bihar Vow To Bar Deleted Names From Social Welfare Schemes
articles.description: BJP governments in both states have started using SIR-linked data to identify beneficiaries they believe should no longer receive welfare benefits.

articles.title: Iran's Araghchi Brings "Minab168" To Delhi For BRICS Talks
articles.description: The situation surrounding the closure of the Strait of Hormuz-- the vital waterway through which around a fifth of global oil supply passes in peacetime-- is expected to feature prominently in bilateral talks between Araghchi and Jaishankar.

articles.title: ‘Atrocious’: SC stays HC’s order restraining TVK MLA from taking part in TN assembly
articles.description: The Supreme Court stayed a Madras High Court order preventing TVK MLA-elect Sreenivasa Sethupathi from participating in the Tamil Nadu Assembly.

articles.title: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US Wants China To Play Active Role In Ending Iran War, Says Marco Rubio Ahead Of Trump-Xi Summit
articles.description: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US President Donald Trump is set to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping today in a high-stakes summit between the two countries.

articles.title: Scrap NEET, allow states to fill medical seats based on Class 12 marks, CM Vijay writes to Centre
articles.description: Following the NEET-UG 2026 cancellation due to paper leak allegations, Tamil Nadu Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay urged the Union government to scrap NEET. He advocated for state-level admissions based on Class 12 marks for MBBS, BDS, and AYUSH seats, citing the exam's flaws and its disadvantage to rural and government school students.

articles.title: Tripura govt implements 50% WFH rule for employees following PM's appeal
articles.description: According to the memorandum, all Heads of Department (HoDs) have been directed to ensure that only 50 per cent of Group C and Group D employees attend office daily

articles.title: EAM Jaishankar meets Maldives foreign minister, discusses bilatreal ties
articles.description: Discussions were held to strengthen the close ties, the people-to-people contact and the longstanding India-Maldives partnership

articles.title: Centre assures push for key highway projects after Punjab CM meets Nitin Gadkari
articles.description: According to an official statement, Punjab chief minister Bhagwant Mann urged the Centre to remove bottlenecks in long-pending road projects and speed up execution of works that have remained incomplete for years despite multiple extensions

articles.title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay revokes astrologer Vettrivel’s appointment as officer on special duty after criticism
articles.description: The decision to withdraw the order comes less than 24 hours after several parties including TVK alliance partners raised objection over his appointment.

articles.title: US Commerce Secy Howard Lutnick backs away from his Epstein 'blackmail' claim in interview with House committee
articles.description: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick faced questioning from House lawmakers regarding his past interactions with Jeffrey Epstein. Lutnick revised earlier statements about Epstein engaging in blackmail, calling it mere speculation. He downplayed several meetings with Epstein, including a 2005 visit that initially disturbed him and his wife. Democrats criticized Lutnick's testimony as evasive, with some calling for his resignation.

articles.title: Mulayam’s stepson Prateek dies at 38; Akhilesh, Yogi pay tributes
articles.description: Prateek, 38, was the stepbrother of former UP CM Akhilesh Yadav and husband of BJP leader Aparna Yadav.

articles.title: Indian students face longer New Zealand visa delays as scrutiny rises
articles.description: Indian students applying for New Zealand visas are experiencing significant processing delays, with applications now taking an average of 30 working days, nearly double the time for Chinese applicants. While rejection rates have improved, these extended timelines are causing concern for students and immigration professionals, potentially impacting New Zealand's appeal as a study destination.

articles.title: Inside the Ring: Trump to raise China nuclear buildup at summit
articles.description: President Trump is expected to raise security concerns regarding China's large-scale nuclear expansion during meetings with Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing, according to senior Trump administration officials. But China remains adamant that it is not interested in Mr. Trump's call to join nuclear arms reduction talks with the U.S. and ...

articles.title: ‘Entirely unfounded’: UAE denies reports of secret visit by Israel PM Netanyahu during Iran conflict
articles.description: The UAE has officially denied reports of a secret visit by Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu or an Israeli military delegation during the recent Israel-Iran conflict. The Ministry of Foreign Affairs stated that all UAE-Israel ties are transparent under the Abraham Accords, dismissing claims of unannounced arrangements.

articles.title: Three held; security beefed up in Bhopal as Muslim community protests assault on man over ‘love jihad’
articles.description: Security heightened in Bhopal after protests by the Muslim community against a man's assault linked to 'love jihad' allegations.

articles.title: US wants China to press Iran as JD Vance says nuclear talks are showing ‘progress’
articles.description: US Vice President JD Vance said progress was being made in negotiations with Iran aimed at ending hostilities, after President Donald Trump rejected Tehran’s latest proposal as unacceptable.

articles.title: MCD to conduct elections on May 23 to fill vacant seats in committee
articles.description: The MCD will hold elections on May 23 to fill six vacant standing committee seats and elect chairpersons for zonal ward committees.

articles.title: 'Structural flaws exposed': Vijay calls for NEET to be abolished after paper leak
articles.description: Tamil Nadu CM renews calls to scrap NEET after exam cancellation due to alleged paper leak, citing disadvantages for rural and disadvantaged students. The CBI has arrested five individuals, with investigations pointing to a leak originating in Nashik and spreading through coaching networks. Protests intensify nationwide demanding accountability.

articles.title: “She’s super jealous”: Stefon Diggs’ ex chef sparks outrage after accusing him of being “abusive” toward Cardi B
articles.description: Stefon Diggs, the former New England Patriots’ wide receiver, might have rekindled his romance with Cardi B, just days after his lawsuit with his ex chef ended in his favor, leaving millions shocked across the world. While both Cardi B and Stefon Diggs remain private about their romance this time, his ex chef has raised eyebrows after accusing him of being “abusive” towards the Grammy winner.

articles.title: Did Netanyahu Secretly Visit UAE During Iran War? Emirates Publicly Denies Israeli Claim
articles.description: Israel claimed Benjamin Netanyahu secretly visited the UAE during the Iran war and held breakthrough talks with the Emirati president. The UAE publicly denied the visit, calling reports of secret meetings or Israeli military delegations “baseless.”

articles.title: ‘Rocky Start’ For Trump In China? Viral Posts Claim Xi Jinping ‘Sent A Message’
articles.description: President Donald Trump arrived in Beijing for a high-stakes summit with Xi Jinping, but social media quickly exploded over one detail, Xi was nowhere at the airport. Viral posts called the moment a diplomatic snub, while Chinese social media mocked Trump with the nickname “Chuan Jianguo.” Despite a grand red-carpet welcome complete with military honors, critics claimed the visit was already off to a rocky start. Here’s what really happened during Trump’s dramatic China arrival.

articles.title: ‘A platonic relationship’: Book claims French President Emmanuel Macron exchanged private messages with Iranian actress Golshifteh Farahani
articles.description: ‘A platonic relationship’: Book claims French President Emmanuel Macron exchanged private messages with Iranian actress Golshifteh Farahani

articles.title: Gujarat DGP directs cops not to parade accused in public
articles.description: Gujarat DGP K L N Rao orders police not to publicly parade accused, citing Supreme Court DK Basu guidelines and 2019 Gujarat HC ruling on custodial dignity.

articles.title: Bengal CM Adhikari holds meeting with BJP actor-MLAs to ensure 'fear-free' film industry
articles.description: West Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari focuses on restoring fear-free environment in Tollywood, addressing syndicate control, and improving transparency in film, education, culture and health sectors under new reforms in West Bengal.

articles.title: MSF slams 'political failure' to end Sudan war, fund vital aid
articles.description: MSF slams 'political failure' to end Sudan war, fund vital aid

articles.title: Cachar youth held for post against CM Himanta
articles.description: In a recent incident, a young man from Sonai in Cachar district was taken into custody in Guwahati for posting derogatory remarks about Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma. The post, which surfaced on Saturday, spread rapidly on social media and sparked considerable unrest in the Sonai community.

articles.title: Putin Humiliates Trump Right Before Xi Meeting; Sets His Own Conditions For Ukraine Agreement
articles.description: Russia has publicly laid down what it calls the “basic condition” for a ceasefire in Ukraine — and it directly targets Kyiv’s control over occupied territory.Speaking to reporters, Kremlin spokesperson Dmitry Peskov said President Volodymyr Zelenskyy must order Ukrainian forces to stop fighting and withdraw from Donbas and what Moscow now calls “Russian regions” for a ceasefire to take effect. Only after that, he said, can “full-scale and very complex” peace talks begin.

articles.title: Israeli PM Netanyahu held secret meeting with UAE President during Iran war
articles.description: Benjamin Netanyahu's unannounced visit to the UAE and talks with the Emirati president during the Iran war signal a breakthrough in bilateral ties under the Abraham Accords framework, strengthening diplomatic and security cooperation.it

articles.title: Karnataka’s Hijab Ban, Court Battle And A Fresh U-Turn - Explained
articles.description: The Karnataka government has withdrawn the contentious 2022 uniform order that restricted the wearing of hijabs in schools. The new directive, issued by the Congress-led government, allows students to wear religious symbols, including hijabs, alongside school uniforms, provided their faces are visible.

articles.title: Trump arrives in Beijing for high-stakes meeting with Xi Jinping; BRICS divisions deepen over Iran war
articles.description: Trump arrives in Beijing for high-stakes meeting with Xi Jinping; BRICS divisions deepen over Iran war

articles.title: Telangana to verify Cheyutha pensioners from May 15
articles.description: Approval of respective gram sabha prerequisite before removing names of deceased individuals from list

articles.title: 'There Will Be A Disaster...': China's RED HOT Warning For Trump | Xi Aide Wang Yi Roars On Cam
articles.description: Ahead of the May 13-15 summit in Beijing, China’s Foreign Minister Wang Yi struck a cautionary tone, warning that “misunderstanding and misjudgement” between Washington and Beijing could derail fragile stability at a critical moment. Urging a reset in tone, Wang said the two powers “cannot change each other, but can change the way we get along,” pitching the visit as an opportunity to rebuild “win-win cooperation” after months of friction.
